name: Cytoscape.js
when_to_use: 需要几十个以上节点的关系图、依赖图或知识网络,并要 force/层次/同心圆布局、pan/zoom、按数据样式和邻域查询时用它,而非手写 SVG 或 Mermaid——原生手写在自动布局、遮挡控制和大图交互上失败;少于 10 节点的静态小图直接用 Mermaid。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能写小型静态 Mermaid,几十节点以上的稳定布局、边路由、pan/zoom、数据驱动样式和图算法查询做不到;Cytoscape.js 用浅 nodes/edges JSON 同时补齐布局引擎、canvas 交互与图论 API。

data_in.note: 主结构是 graph;也可把 relational-ref 先投影成 nodes/edges。下面只裁剪 Cytoscape.js 高频输入类型,不另造数据协议;source/target 必须引用 node id。

spec.note: canvas 渲染器要求挂载容器在初始化前已有明确尺寸;默认 height 420px,AI 可传其他像素值,禁用 vh/百分比高(铁律 3)。容器尺寸变化后调用 cy.resize()。

carriers.widget: conditional:需先把显式像素高度的 div 落入 shadowRoot,再把该 div 传给 container;核心 canvas 渲染与内置布局无需额外 CDN 资产
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + canvas,无 worker/wasm/字体或上行依赖

en.when_to_use: Use it for relationship graphs, dependency graphs, or knowledge networks with dozens or more nodes when you need force-directed, hierarchical, or concentric layout, pan/zoom, data-driven styling, and neighborhood queries, instead of handwritten SVG or Mermaid, which fail at automatic layout, overlap control, and large-graph interaction. For a static graph with fewer than 10 nodes, use Mermaid directly.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can only write small static Mermaid diagrams and cannot provide stable layout, edge routing, pan/zoom, data-driven styling, and graph-algorithm queries for dozens of nodes; Cytoscape.js adds a layout engine, canvas interaction, and graph-theory API to shallow nodes/edges JSON.

data_in.note: The primary structure is graph; relational-ref can also be projected to nodes/edges first. The schema below is a focused subset of common Cytoscape.js input types, not a new data protocol; source/target must reference node ids.

spec.note: The canvas renderer requires the mount container to have explicit dimensions before initialization; default height is 420px. AI may provide another pixel value, but vh and percentage heights are forbidden (rule 3). Call cy.resize() after the container size changes.
